predictions.prediction: Increased authoritarian measures in Hungary and other nations within 24 months.
predictions.falsification: Hungary and other nations show improvements in democratic practices within 24 months.

predictions.prediction: New AI regulations will be introduced in the US within 18 months, focusing on accountability and safety.
predictions.falsification: No significant AI regulations are introduced within 18 months.

predictions.falsification: No significant political violence or protests occur within 12 months.

predictions.prediction: Significant forest fires linked to El Niño will occur within 12 months, reversing recent progress in forest conservation.
predictions.falsification: No major forest fires occur within 12 months.

predictions.prediction: Oil prices will remain volatile, with potential spikes above $130/barrel within 6 months if the conflict worsens.
predictions.falsification: Oil prices stabilize below $100/barrel within 6 months and no significant escalation occurs.
